name: Pamabrom
description: Pamabrom under the market name Diurex Max, is a diuretic. The active ingredient with diuretic properties in pamabrom is 8-bromotheophylline. It is used for the relief of temporary water weight gain, bloating, swelling and full feeling associated with the premenstrual and menstrual periods. It is also available in combination products with [DB00316] to reduce menstrual pains and mestrual-related bloating.

interactions.name: Sodium phosphate
interactions.description: Pamabrom may increase the nephrotoxic activities of Sodium phosphate.

interactions.name: Candesartan cilexetil
interactions.description: The risk or severity of hypotension can be increased when Candesartan cilexetil is combined with Pamabrom.

interactions.name: Acemetacin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Pamabrom can be decreased when used in combination with Acemetacin.

interactions.name: Tramadol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Tramadol is combined with Pamabrom.

interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Morphine is combined with Pamabrom.
